title: Self-Scanner + Supply Chain Analyzer + Posture Benchmark — CI Gate Integration
description: test_self_scanner.py, test_supply_chain_analyzer.py, and test_posture_benchmark.py cluster together. ALDECI scans itself as a test subject (no demo data policy). The supply chain analyzer detects malicious packages by version and context. Gap: self-scan results are not gated in CI/CD — a developer can merge code that introduces a vulnerable dependency without the self-scanner blocking the PR.
missing: CI gate integration: GitHub Actions workflow step that runs the self-scanner on every PR and fails the check if any CRITICAL findings are introduced
Supply chain diff: compare current package lockfile against baseline and report net-new dependencies that have not passed the supply chain analyzer
Posture benchmark CI gate: fail PR if the self-scan causes the posture benchmark score to drop below the configured threshold (default: B grade)
